productDisplayName: Puma Men's Contest Hi White Navy Shoe
description: If you're looking for a way to enhance your sneaker-wear to a more classic, old-school appeal, the puma Contest Hi kicks in leather are a good place to start!Upper Crinkled-leather upper for style and comfort Padded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and a snug Fit Perforated formstripe detailing for enhanced ventilation Upper stitched to the outsole for extra durability High ankle support for comfort Midsole Breathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort. TPU and EVA midsole combined to offer support and ample cushioning Outsole Durable rubber outsole for absolute grip and traction
